productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Black Formal Shoes
description: Style NoteSleek, stylish and elegant, these formal shoes from U.S. Polo Association will polish your office staples with a subtle touch of class. Your everyday wear gets a facelift with the addition of this pair. Note the upraised heel in durable TPU - fashioned to bend so you can have optimal comfort. Now, we can't think of any reasons why you shouldn't buy this shoe!Product DetailsSmooth leather upper with a blunt toe Four hole lace ups, has a pull loop at the backReinforced overlay at the heelBlunt toe cup with mild brogueingUpper adhered to the outsoleTPU outsole with a stacked heel, has branded grooves on the forefoot regionThe shoes come with a bag to help you pack them when you travelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust
